title: hymenopappus hintoniorum
intro: Hymenopappus hintoniorum, also known as Hinton's fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenopappus hintoniorum include treating colds, fever, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the plant's roots and leaves in a tincture or decoction.
